summary: Thin, distant recording with poor audio quality and no noted musical highlights
review: The sole review describes the tape as noticeably distant and thin, indicating a sub‑par listening experience. No comments were made about the performance itself, so the show’s musical merit cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a 0‑star rating; it focuses solely on poor sound quality and provides no insight into the performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the audio is distant and thin, suggesting lack of clarity and presence.
